result.stderr:
OC.TcRunner 1.5.1+ae75356c57875c95f784e11c78a7d4ede773b95f
Copyright (C) 2025 SpiraTec AG

  -w, --workingDir        Specify the path of the TwinCAT project directory.
                          Uses the current directory if not specified.

  -t, --timeout           Specify the timeout for the test-run in seconds.
                          Default: 120

  -e, --exclude-folder    Specify the name of the test folder to exclude when
                          creating the artifact.
                          Can also be a path like Parent/Tests if the folder is
                          not in the plc root.
                          Default: Tests

  -a, --accept-all        Accept all git branches.
                          By default, branch 'development' is expected.

  -s, --skip-dirty        Skip git dirty check.

  -p, --push              Push to remote repository after commit.

  -d, --dry-run           Don't create artifacts or make any changes.

  -i, --install           Install the plc library after creation.
                          Default: True

  -c, --compiled          Save the library as a compiled-library artifact.

  -f, --force             Force a new commit even if the current version has
                          been prepared already.

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.

OC.TcRunner 1.5.1+ae75356c57875c95f784e11c78a7d4ede773b95f
Copyright (C) 2025 SpiraTec AG

  -w, --workingDir        Specify the path of the TwinCAT project directory.
                          Uses the current directory if not specified.

  -t, --timeout           Specify the timeout for the test-run in seconds.
                          Default: 120

  -e, --exclude-folder    Specify the name of the test folder to exclude when
                          creating the artifact.
                          Can also be a path like Parent/Tests if the folder is
                          not in the plc root.
                          Default: Tests

  -a, --accept-all        Accept all git branches.
                          By default, branch 'development' is expected.

  -s, --skip-dirty        Skip git dirty check.

  -p, --push              Push to remote repository after commit.

  -d, --dry-run           Don't create artifacts or make any changes.

  -i, --install           Install the plc library after creation.
                          Default: True

  -c, --compiled          Save the library as a compiled-library artifact.

  -f, --force             Force a new commit even if the current version has
                          been prepared already.

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.

options.description:
Accept all git branches.
By default, branch 'development' is expected.
Save the library as a compiled-library artifact.
Don't create artifacts or make any changes.

Specify the name of the test folder to exclude when creating the artifact.
Can also be a path like Parent/Tests if the folder is not in the plc root.
Default: Tests
Force a new commit even if the current version has been prepared already.

Install the plc library after creation.
Default: True
Push to remote repository after commit.

Specify the timeout for the test-run in seconds.
Default: 120

Specify the path of the TwinCAT project directory.
Uses the current directory if not specified.
